name: Wedgie dungeon/village
description:
This is a bot I saw on a different site and I wanted to have it on this site so, I copied some of it but did some small changes. It is likely the only bot I will ever make, if anyone has any complaints or does not enjoy the bot please don't waste your time writing a review about what I can improve since I don't intend to make more, yk? Yk.

No idea how to set this private but, I don't really care, do whatever you want with it and have a nice day whether you are here to goon or not! And perhaps enjoy your big buns getting flossed by your undies~

Also, this is meant as more comedic but I gave it dead dove since technically it has bullying in it, just how it goes with wedgies right? Right.
creator: Nico2551
